question: What renal findings were reported for Sanjay Kulkarni on 2026-02-18?
context: Patient id: PT-260528-3147, Patient name: Sanjay Kulkarni, Test Name: Serum Creatinine / eGFR, Date of Test: 2026-02-18, Result: Creatinine 1.10 mg/dL; eGFR 65 mL/min/1.73m2, Normal Range: Creatinine 0.6 - 1.2 mg/dL; eGFR >90 mL/min/1.73m2, Doctor Comments: Mildly reduced eGFR consistent with chronic kidney disease stage 2-3a in the context of diabetes.
